articles.description: The prime suspect remains on the run three months on from the attack

articles.title: Birmingham man who 'demanded wife's PIP' jailed for domestic abuse
articles.description: Tarsam Singh, from Moseley, regularly verbally abused and financially exploited his partner over seven years

articles.title: Nearby shooting interrupts 13-year-old's birthday party in Paterson; 1 killed, 3 injured
articles.description: The violence erupted around 6:30 p.m. Saturday near the intersection of East 29th Street and 10th Avenue.

articles.title: String of suspected gang-related blasts rocks Brussels suburb
articles.description: A series of explosions in Brussels’ Saint-Gilles district has been linked to escalating gang violence Read Full Article at RT.com

articles.title: PM: Immediate aid and shelter being arranged for Sandakan fire victims
articles.description: KUALA LUMPUR: The Federal Government and the Sabah state government are coordinating basic assistance and temporary accommodation as soon as possible for the victims of the fire in Kampung Bahagia, Sandakan.

articles.title: Three year old shoots two people during ‘Youth Turkey Hunt’ in Wisconsin
articles.description: A man and his son were hospitalized after getting shot in the back, hands and head by a three-year-old boy during a youth hunting trip in Wisconsin.

articles.title: IDF names reservist killed in southern Lebanon; nine other soldiers wounded
articles.description: With the death of Lidor Porat, 31, the number of Israeli soldiers killed in southern Lebanon since the start of the current war rose to 15. Since October 7, the IDF has announced the deaths of 940 soldiers

articles.title: Multiple people shot near Howe Community Park, Sacramento sheriff says
articles.description: Multiple people have been shot at Howe Community Park on Saturday night, according to the Sacramento County Sheriff's Office.

articles.title: Arizona teaching aide 'had sex with student on park bench after falling pregnant'
articles.description: A 22-year-old teacher aide working at an Arizona school was arrested after being accused of having sexual relations with an 8th grader, leading to a pregnancy.

articles.title: These North Korean brothers spent 10 years planning their escape. Months after reaching freedom, everything changed
articles.description: Two brothers spent a decade plotting their escape from North Korea – an audacious plan conceived by their late father, whose ashes they carried as they crept toward a boat moored in the shadows. There were guards nearby, and no second chances.

articles.title: Man arrested after missing person case in Fort Worth turns into homicide investigation
articles.description: Authorities found the victim's body in an open field on the east side of Fort Worth Friday.

articles.title: Miraculous rescue mission as two divers are saved after spending 22 hours missing in the ocean near North Stradbroke Island
articles.description: The divers are believed to have gone missing around 10am on Saturday.

articles.title: Austria recalls baby food jars in rat poison scare
articles.description: VIENNA — A supplier of baby food jars in Austria is recalling a line after discovering that rat poison may have been introduced through tampering. The HiPP brand said it was recalling its “entire line of baby food jars sold at SPAR Austria” as “it cannot be ruled out that a hazardous substance was introduced into the ‘HiPP Carrot/Potato 190 grams’ product through tampering, and consumption could be fatal”. Austria’s agency for food protection said police were investigating and that the rat poison may have been introduced as part of an extortion scheme. READ: FDA oversees disposal of infant formula [...]... Keep on reading: Austria recalls baby food jars in rat poison scare

articles.title: Remains of at least 50 infants and six adults found 'illegally dumped' at a cemetery in Trinidad and Tobago
articles.description: The remains of at least 50 infants and six adults were discovered on Saturday after they had apparently been discarded at a cemetery in Trinidad and Tobago.

articles.title: Dane County Sheriff's Office arrests 'significant number' of protestors that tried to break into Ridglan Farms
articles.description: The Dane County Sheriff's Office says a "significant number of arrests were made" after it responded to around 1,000 activists converging on Ridglan Farms in the Town of Blue Mounds on Saturday.

articles.title: Heartbroken family of British graduate shot dead by her own father was 'failed' by David Lammy who did not offer any emotional or legal support
articles.description: Lucy Harrison was shot through the heart on January 10, 2025, by her father Kris Harrison, a British citizen, while he was 'showing off' his gun at his home in Prosper, Texas.

articles.title: North Korea launches ballistic missiles toward sea
articles.description: South Korea says North Korea has launched multiple ballistic missiles toward the North’s eastern waters

articles.title: 'Situation is dire': No progress amid 35th anniversary of deaths in custody report
articles.description: Since the report's release, more than 630 Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander people have died in the custody of police or corrective services.

articles.title: Crooks carjack Toyota Corolla from women in Brooklyn Lowe’s parking lot
articles.description: A 72-year-old woman sitting on her walker and a 48-year-old woman were loading their new merchandise into their 2004 Toyota Corolla at the Lowe's parking lot in Mill Basin, when a man hopped into it driver's seat and began to drive off.

articles.title: 4 wounded in weekend shooting in N.J. city
articles.description: Paterson Mayor Andre Sayegh confirmed a shooting in the city resulted in four victims.
